title: Kili Row

startPoint.en: Talk to Kili in the City of Um's smithy.
startPoint.es: Habla con Kili en la herrería de la City of Um.

quests.title: Collect a set of necromancer robes from Sostratus

items.name: Regular ghostly ink
items.display: 2 regular ghostly ink for drawing glyphs, or having the required glyphs already drawn

items.name: Basic ghostly ink
items.display: 7 basic ghostly ink for drawing glyphs, or having the required glyphs already drawn

items.name: Rituals
items.display: 4 light sources for rituals, or having them already set up

recommended.name: Basic ghostly ink
recommended.display: 11 more basic ghostly ink and bones for conducting a lesser communion ritual, if doing this instead of killing chickens and if not having already drawn the required glyphs

recommended.name: Necromancy
recommended.display: Necromancy weapons for killing chickens, if doing this instead of a lesser communion ritual

kills: Optional; 5 chickens (level 1, must be damaged with Necromancy)

rewards.name: Lesser ensoul material
rewards.display: Access to lesser, regular, and greater ensoul material rituals

rewards.name: Death Skull equipment
rewards.display: Ability to upgrade Death Skull equipment and deathwarden robe armour to tier 20

rewards.name: Kili
rewards.display: Ability to learn further equipment upgrades from Kili

rewards.name: Thalmund
rewards.display: Ability to access Thalmund and Thalmund's Wares

text.en: Talk to Kili by the anvils in north-eastern corner of the City of Um
text.es: Habla con Kili junto a los yunques en la esquina noreste de la City of Um

text.en: Go to the ritual site in the City of Um
text.es: Ve al lugar de rituales en la City of Um

text.en: Select the Lesser ensoul material (Kili Row) with the pedestal
text.es: Selecciona el Lesser ensoul material (Kili Row) con el pedestal

text.en: Complete the ritual (requires Change I glyph which requires two inkwells of regular ghostly ink and one inkwell of basic ghostly ink to draw)
text.es: Completa el ritual (requiere el glifo Change I, que a su vez requiere dos tinteros de tinta fantasmal normal y un tintero de tinta fantasmal básica para dibujarlo)

text.en: Withdraw the output of the ritual from the ritual chest on the ritual site
text.es: Retira el resultado del ritual del cofre de rituales en el lugar de rituales

text.en: Go back to Kili to get a soul urn
text.es: Vuelve con Kili para conseguir una urna de almas

text.en: Kill five chickens using Necromancy anywhere or go back to the ritual site and perform a lesser communion ritual
text.es: Mata cinco pollos usando Nigromancia en cualquier lugar, o vuelve al lugar de rituales y realiza un ritual de comunión menor
